creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
PORT: security/openssl

There is a regression bug in the latest release of openssl. More
information regarding this bug is located here:
<http://marc.info/?l=openssl-dev&m=136017226409459&w=2>
and on the openssl-dev list.

A patch is located here:
<http://git.openssl.org/gitweb/?p=openssl.git;a=commitdiff;h=32cc247>

Without this patch, sending via port 587 to a secure Postfix server is
not possible. The problem is not limited to that only however.

Fix: 

Download and install the patch
